data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes decision time by simplifying user choices through intuitive UI design.
data.technical_spec: Single-screen interactions, reduced option overload in interfaces.

data.title: Fitt's Law
data.description: Optimizes interactive elements to improve usability.
data.technical_spec: Consistently sized and located buttons for easy user access.

data.title: Doherty Threshold
data.description: Ensures system feedback within 400ms to maintain user engagement.
data.technical_spec: Asynchronous loading with skeleton screens for perceived speed.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Enhances visual appeal to increase perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Consistent branding with visual hierarchy and whitespace usage.

data.title: Zeigarnik Effect
data.description: Encourages task completion by keeping incomplete tasks prominent.
data.technical_spec: Clear progression indicators, notification badges for pending actions.
